role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Agent correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and stayed within its domain by not speculating on language.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (rolling hills, Mediterranean scrub) as declared.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific plant species (Cistus, Cycas) and their native ranges, adhering to the botanical domain.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed infrastructure standards (street lamps, curbing, utility poles) and road markings, adhering to the regulatory domain.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain knowledge (architecture + infrastructure) to distinguish between similar countries, adhering to the meta domain.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents stayed within their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified the country. The tournament logic was sound, using the specific 'calçada' sidewalk and utility pole styles to distinguish Portugal from Spain.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of hills, white walls, and green vegetation match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of the potted sago palm and roadside scrub match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the black curved lamp, concrete curbing, and utility poles match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Synthesis of architectural and infrastructural cues matches the visual evidence.
